name: tony-koop
description: Tony Koop's private skill marketplace — Heifer Zephyr maker/instrument-design skills, personal-life skills (yoga, ideas, playlists), WRFCoin engineering ops, and the skills-meta audit tool. Backed by the claude-skills git repo so all installs auto-update from main.

plugins.name: heifer-zephyr-maker
plugins.description: Heifer Zephyr maker portfolio: instrument-maker, maker-engineering, makerspace, sheet-metal, laser-art, habitat-maker, reverse-engineer, sheet-music.

plugins.name: tony-eng-ops
plugins.description: WRFCoin engineering ops: tmux-sprint, merge-review, sprint-supervisor, sprint-update, run-swarm, ci-triage, scaffold-hygiene, disk-cleanup.

plugins.name: skills-meta
plugins.description: Drift-audit tool for installed skills across Claude, Codex, and Gemini runtimes.
